title: Contractions at 30 Weeks - Preterm Labor
chief_complaint: 25-year-old G1P0 at 30 weeks with regular painful contractions every 5 minutes for 3 hours. Cervix 2cm dilated, 50% effaced. Membranes intact. History of UTI last week.

hidden_data.ua: Leukocyte esterase positive, nitrites positive (UTI confirmed)

key_learning_points: Preterm labor: regular contractions + cervical change <37 weeks
Betamethasone for fetal lung maturity (24-34 weeks)

patient_responses.contractions: They started this morning, getting stronger
patient_responses.urine: I had burning with urination last week

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Preterm labor at 30 weeks.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is preterm labor. The cervical change + contractions confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: Preterm labor: Betamethasone 12mg IM q24h x2 doses. MgSO4 for neuroprotection (4g bolus then 1g/hr). Nifedipine 20mg PO then 10-20mg q6-8h for tocolysis. Treat UTI with antibiotics. GBS prophylaxis. Neonatology consultation.
